Venus, a good friend of Saturn in the 2nd to the latter and Venus

270 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
aspected by Mars conjunct the Moon in Scorpio, clearly indicates the native
will own landed property (Mars aspecting Venus) with a number of cattle and
be engaged in agricultural activity.
The native will attend to father's death ceremonies in his 13 in the
system as the Sun opposes Jupiter conjunct Rahu. His 30th and 43rd years are
good when Jupiter transits Cancer and becomes exalted. His longevity may be
about 66 years (Jupiter's contact with Ketu in 6th round: 12 x 5 + 6= 66).
CHART 410 (Examples)
This native was born in a house
Sat. Sun
which is having on either side or in the
Ven. Mer. Dh.
opposite side a temple dedicated to Moon Mars
Siva as there is Ketu in the second to
Jupiter.
The father of the native denoted
by the Sun is in Taurus the house of
Venus, with Mercury and Mars indi
cating green fields full of fruit -trees Dt. Jupt.
